data.reasoningText: The user wants to run their .NET tests with `dotnet test` and collect a crash dump if any test crashes the host. Let me first look at the project files to understand the setup, then run the tests with the appropriate blame-crash options.

arguments.description: Run dotnet test with blame-crash to collect crash dumps

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-f86ba617d7ef43579d5ca6cbeae25f89 && dotnet test --blame-crash", "description": "Run dotnet test with blame-crash to collect crash dumps", "initial_wait": 60}

data.content:
Tests ran successfully with crash dump collection enabled. The command used:

```
dotnet test --blame-crash
```

All tests passed. If a test had crashed the host process, a crash dump (`.dmp` file) would be collected in the `TestResults` directory for post-mortem analysis.
